backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor defining all data types (Curation, Swarm, Location, LawToken, InterpretationToken, voting, collectibles) and persistent state maps for the application backend, with imports for access control and user approval modules.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report identifying that CreateLawTokenDialog.tsx implements the fix to automatically pass the current swarm's ID as parentSwarmId when creating a law token, eliminating the 'Parent Swarm does not exist' error.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON-formatted summaries of all frontend source files, describing the purpose and key changes of each component, hook, page, and utility in the frontend codebase.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML entry point for the React app, mounting the root div and loading the main TypeScript module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root application component managing view state (including swarm-detail), authentication, profile setup modal, archived collectibles cleanup, and routing between all major views including SwarmDetailView.
frontend/src/components/CreateLawTokenDi: Dialog component for creating a Law Token on the Yes/No side of a question-of-law swarm; uses parentLocation.parentSwarmId to correctly pass the swarm ID to the backend's createLocation call, fixing the parent swarm not found error.
frontend/src/components/CreateNodeDialog: Multi-type node creation dialog supporting curations, swarms, locations, and interpretation tokens; shows an informational alert when the swarm has the 'question-of-law' tag explaining auto-creation of Yes/No locations.
A confirmation dialog component that requires the user to type 'RESET' before permanently deleting all application data (curations, swarms, annotations, etc.) via a mutation hook, then reloads the page on success.
A modal dialog that allows users to filter and sort graph nodes by type and various sort options, rendering flat node items with badges showing metadata like jurisdiction, parent curation, and shared law token usage counts.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: A simple footer component displaying a copyright notice and a link to caffeine.ai with a heart icon.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: The main app header providing navigation tabs (Graph, List, Terminal, Swarms, etc.), theme toggling, login/logout via Internet Identity, and access to create-node and profile-settings dialogs.
frontend/src/components/LandingGraphDiag: A canvas-based animated graph diagram for the landing page that fetches graph data with a 24-hour localStorage cache, renders nodes and edges with force-directed simulation, and supports hover tooltips.
frontend/src/components/LawTokenCard.tsx: A card component that displays a law token's meaning/label along with the creator's display name (resolved from their profile) and formatted creation timestamp.
frontend/src/components/MermaidDiagram.t: A component that dynamically loads the Mermaid library from CDN and renders a Mermaid diagram from provided text, handling loading states, stale render cancellation, and error display.
frontend/src/components/NFTDetailModal.t: Modal dialog for displaying NFT (Law or Interpretation Token) details, showing edition status and allowing users to mint collectible copies using BUZZ tokens.
frontend/src/components/NFTGallery.tsx: Grid gallery displaying the current user's Law Token and Interpretation Token collectibles, with minted-badge indicators and click-to-open detail modal functionality.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSettingsM: Modal for editing user profile name, social URL, and mint settings (number of copies), while also displaying the user's BUZZ token balance.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: One-time onboarding modal that prompts a new user to enter a username and creates their profile via the saveCallerUserProfile mutation.
frontend/src/components/PublishCollectib: Modal for publishing a Question of Law swarm as an open-membership collectible badge, allowing the user to set a title, description, and upload an image.
frontend/src/components/SchemaBuilderFil: Modal for browsing and filtering Interpretation Tokens by tags, from/to nodes, and sort order, rendering each token as a clickable item that opens its detail modal.
frontend/src/components/SwarmMembershipA: Displays pending and approved swarm membership requests, allowing swarm creators to approve contributors with principal validation and toast notifications.
frontend/src/components/SwarmMembershipB: Renders a join/member/creator badge or button for a swarm based on the current user's membership status, and handles join request submission.
frontend/src/components/SwarmMembershipM: Shows an accordion list of all swarms the current user created or joined, embedding SwarmMembershipApproval for each to manage contributors.
frontend/src/components/TerminalDisambig: Renders a keyboard-navigable list of candidate nodes when a terminal command matches multiple names, supporting arrow-key selection, Enter to confirm, and Escape to cancel.
frontend/src/components/TerminalOntology: Displays ontology output in both Turtle (TTL) and Mermaid diagram formats with copy buttons and error handling for diagram rendering failures.
frontend/src/components/VoronoiDiagram.t: Renders an interactive canvas-based Voronoi diagram of graph nodes with a 24-hour localStorage cache, hover tooltips, and a pixel-sampling algorithm for cell boundary computation.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous ICP backend actor using React Query, invalidating dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides a React context and hook for Internet Identity authentication, including login, logout, and identity state management using DFINITY's AuthClient.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for fetching and mutating backend data (graph data, swarms, tokens, leaderboard, etc.), including a helper to build a GraphData tree from flat owned data.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that sets up Tailwind directives, OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light/dark themes, scrollbar styling, and theme-independent Voronoi diagram styles.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that renders the React app wrapped in QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/BuzzLeaderboard.tsx: Page component that displays a ranked leaderboard table of users by their BUZZ score, with trophy icons for the top three ranks.
frontend/src/pages/CollectiblesView.tsx: Page component that renders the NFTGallery component inside a styled container for browsing and minting Law Token and Interpretation Token collectibles.
frontend/src/pages/DebugPanel.tsx: Admin debug page that displays graph data (curations, swarms, locations, law tokens, interpretation tokens) in tabbed scrollable views, with a data reset option for admins.
frontend/src/pages/GraphView.tsx: Interactive graph visualization page that renders nodes and edges using a canvas-based layout with spatial indexing, zoom/pan controls, node type filters, and persistent layout caching via sessionStorage.
frontend/src/pages/OntologiesView.tsx: Displays the core Hyvmind OWL ontology in Turtle syntax alongside dynamically generated per-swarm ontologies, with collapsible sections and download functionality.
frontend/src/pages/SwarmDetailView.tsx: Detail view for a single swarm showing a split Yes/No panel of law tokens associated with each side, with controls for adding law tokens and publishing the swarm as a collectible.
frontend/src/pages/SwarmsView.tsx: Lists all swarms tagged as 'question-of-law' in a card grid, showing parent curation, jurisdiction, and creation date, with click-through navigation to swarm detail.
frontend/src/pages/TerminalPage.tsx: CLI-style terminal interface for executing graph management commands (create curations, swarms, locations, interpretation tokens), with session persistence, disambiguation picker, and ontology output rendering.
frontend/src/pages/TreeView.tsx: Renders a hierarchical tree view of graph nodes (curations, swarms, locations, law tokens, interpretation tokens) with expand/collapse, filtering, schema building, and node creation capabilities. Includes export to Turtle/Mermaid ontology and swarm membership management.
frontend/src/utils/archivedCollectiblesS: Provides localStorage-backed utility functions to get, set, and clear hidden collectible IDs keyed by user principal.
frontend/src/utils/coreOntology.ts: Defines shared RDF/OWL ontology prefix declarations, class definitions, and property definitions for the Hyvmind knowledge graph in Turtle format.
frontend/src/utils/ontologySanitize.ts: Exports utility functions to sanitize strings into valid Turtle local names or Mermaid node IDs, and to truncate labels for compact diagram display.
frontend/src/utils/terminalCommands.ts: Implements terminal command handlers for creating and managing graph nodes (curations, swarms, locations, interpretation tokens), including archive/unarchive utilities and input validation logic.
frontend/src/utils/terminalMessages.ts: Provides formatting functions that return user-facing help text and error/result messages for the terminal command interface.
frontend/src/utils/terminalNameResolutio: Resolves node references (by name or ID) from terminal command arguments against loaded graph data, returning resolved, ambiguous, or not-found status with candidate details.
frontend/src/utils/terminalOntologyMerma: Generates a compact Mermaid flowchart diagram for a given ontology node, showing parent/child and interpretation relationships (FromRelation/ToRelation) with solid-line connectors and limited child/interpretation counts for compactness.
frontend/src/utils/terminalOntologyTurtl: Generates a Turtle (RDF) serialization for a given ontology node, organized into three sections (Properties, Classes, Relations) using core ontology prefixes and typed tag annotations.
frontend/src/utils/terminalOutputFormatt: Provides utilities to parse terminal message text into structured line tokens with indentation and type metadata, and to retrieve emoji markers for success/error message types.
frontend/src/utils/terminalParser.ts: Parses slash-prefixed terminal command strings into structured objects with command name, key-value fields (including quoted values and brace-delimited token syntax), and a simple argument for the /find command.
frontend/src/utils/terminalSession.ts: Handles saving, loading, and clearing terminal session messages in localStorage with versioned serialization to invalidate stale sessions.
frontend/src/utils/ttlToMermaid.ts: Parses Turtle (TTL) text to extract node labels and relationships (hasChild, hasParent, FromRelation, ToRelation) and converts them into a Mermaid flowchart diagram string.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading, storing, and clearing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage persistence support.
frontend/src/utils/voronoiPalette.ts: Defines a fixed color palette (fill, stroke, seed) for five Hyvmind node types and exports a helper to retrieve the style by node type name.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration with dark mode, custom OKLCH-based color tokens, border radius, box shadow, accordion keyframes, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Project state metadata describing a bug-fix request to auto-inject the current swarm's ID into the CreateLawTokenDialog when triggered from SwarmDetailView, preventing a 'Parent Swarm does not exist' error.
